query:
SELECT w.id, w.name, w.taxId, w.taxIdType, w.subscriptionStatus, w.createdAt,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u WHERE u.workspaceId = w.id) AS user_count,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients c WHERE c.workspaceId = w.id) AS client_count,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports r WHERE r.workspaceId = w.id) AS report_count
FROM workspaces w
WHERE w.taxId = '037216298'
ORDER BY w.createdAt;
